title: Cybernetic Love Affair
content:
{{Top|leg}}
"'''Cybernetic Love Affair'''" was a [[Music/Legends|song]] that was written and performed by [[Annadale Fayde]] on her album ''[[Emotional Hostages]]''. It was given a Scarlet rating by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-05-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''
